raw_consumer_statement:
- XX/XX/year> Open the Bloomingdales Credit Card ; A lot of misleading information, including the benefit and discount ; - Bought some bags from XXXX  store on the same day, cost {$5600.00} ; - Return all the items because I can not bring them back to my hometown ; - some days later, I found I didn't get the refund ; So I went the XXXX store again to talk about that with the employee ; The employee confirmed my returns and called the credit card department. And the credit card department made some notes and told me they would process it within 15 business days ; - some days later, I called the credit department again. They asked me to repeat the whole thing again. And asked me to wait another 15 business days ; - Same thing happened another couple of times after that ;... 
- Until this week, I called the credit department again and the representative still told me he would create a case for me. I have to wait another 15 business days or a month. When I requested to talk to his supervisor about this issue. He said his supervisor couldn't talk with me and would call me back. But I've never received call from his supervisor. He actually didn't do any help to move this case forward. 
- After I kept asking him, he said he would help take a look of my account. And later, he told me that they refunded my money as rewards to my account. 
First, nobody asked me and got my permission to return my money as rewards. If my money is refunded as rewards to my account, that means I have to spend my money in Bloomingdales only. It deprives my right of freedom to use my money, which is not fair to me. 
Second, I've never even received the rewards in my account. Which was also confirmed by the representative after I kept asking him to double check. 

- It's already over 3 Months since the first time that I contact the Bloomingdales Credit Card department. The balance of my credit card is still there and They still haven't provided any solution about this issue. So I need your help to get my money back and protect my right of freedom.
